g.text: Read CR spec, status OCID, and delete intent
Keep status-bound OCID authoritative for later update or delete paths
Get the OCI resource by known identifier
Resolve an existing OCI resource by display name
Persist the resolved or created OCID back into status
- Compartment-only drift currently reaches the move path
only when another mutable diff already triggers
Resolve the target stream ID from spec, status, or name lookup before submitting delete.
Confirm deletion with GetStream until the lifecycle is DELETED or the resource is not found.
Delete the owned Secret only after OCI delete confirmation.
Remove the finalizer after OCI deletion is confirmed
Stay blocked until Secret cleanup succeeds or is absent
Request requeue and keep the finalizer
Return an unsuccessful terminal reconcile result
Compare live OCI state with the supported drift surface
Reject the change before any OCI mutation
Resolve the authoritative OCID from spec, status, or name lookup before any update or delete.
Move the stream compartment before mutable updates when another supported drift already opens UpdateStream.
Require MessagesEndpoint before generating the connection Secret.
Apply only the supported in-place update surface
Require the live endpoint before writing Secret data
Return success for the usable active state
Block successful completion until Secret sync succeeds
